title: Codehooks Queue Job
description: A job in the Codehooks asynchronous queue system. Jobs are enqueued to named topics and processed by registered worker functions.

_id.description: Unique identifier of the enqueued job.

topic.description: The queue topic name the job belongs to.

payload.description: The job payload data to be processed by the worker function.

status.description: The current processing status of the job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was enqueued.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the job finished processing.
